projects.name: Burst Rifle
projects.desc:
Featuring sound effects, an ammo counter that counts down and double triggers!

(This project is no longer using MicroPython and is instead built and compiled to run natively on Pico and Pico 2 using Rust. 🦀)

projects.name: Plasma Pistol
projects.desc:
This model features:
  • Trigger!
  • Reloading ammo!
  • Ammo counter mag!
  • Recoiling function!
  • LED lighting!
